items.title: NBA draft lottery reform: Pros and cons of the new...
items.summary: The NBA has approved significant anti-tanking measures. Will they work? Tim Bontemps examines the good, the bad and the head-scratching changes coming to the draft lottery.

items.title: VIDEO Ukrajinska tenisačica o potezu Ruskinje: To je kao da igrate za časnike Gestapa
items.summary: UKRAJINSKA tenisačica Oleksandra Olijnikova oštro je prozvala Ruskinju Dianu Shnaider jer je nastupila na turniru sponzoriranom od Gazproma.

items.title: Williams in talks about potential return at Queen's
items.summary: Serena Williams is in discussions about a potential return to competitive tennis at Queen's Club next month.

items.title: Mudražija se vraća u Dinamo
items.summary: CIPARSKI nogometni klub AEK Larnaca potvrdio je da neće otkupiti ugovor Roberta Mudražije, koji je tamo bio na posudbi iz Dinama.

items.title: UŽIVO Transferi: Hajduk je na pragu prvog ljetnog pojačanja
items.summary: Ljetni prijelazni rok u HNL-u traje od 27. lipnja do 7. rujna. U Engleskoj počinje već 14. lipnja, a u većini europskih liga traje do 31. kolovoza ili 1. rujna. Važan utjecaj imat će i Svjetsko prvenstvo (11. lipnja - 19. srpnja)

items.title: Preminuo Claude Lemieux (60), četverostruki osvajač Stanley Cupa
items.summary: OSVOJIO je četiri Stanley Cupa s tri različite momčadi.

items.title: USA boss Pochettino holds initial talks with AC Milan
items.summary: Mauricio Pochettino has held initial talks with AC Milan to become their next manager following the sacking of Massimiliano Allegri.

items.title: Tiafoe gets racquet back after Instagram plea
items.summary: Frances Tiafoe says the racquet he lost when celebrating his French Open second-round win with the crowd has been returned to him.

items.title: Mafija htjela oteti Van Bastena. Odustali su da ne pomognu Interu protiv Milana
items.summary: BIVŠI mafijaš Giampaolo Manca otkrio je da je vođa bande planirao oteti Marca van Bastena.

items.title: Cibona u drami u Draženovu domu izborila finale sa Zadrom
items.summary: "Vukove" su do slavlja predvodili Justin Roberson sa 21 košem i sedam skokova, Luka Skorić sa 15, Markus Lončar sa 14, te Žan Mark Šiško sa 13 koševa

items.title: Raspored i ljestvica HNL-a, svih utakmica Europe i Kupa 25/26.

items.title: Source: Wemby warned for ditching reporters
items.summary: The NBA has warned Victor Wembanyama for violating media access rules after he did not speak to reporters following the Spurs' Game 5 loss, the league told ESPN.

items.title: Trump plans to attend NBA Finals game at MSG
items.summary: President Donald Trump said he is planning on attending an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next month.

items.title: Sources: Hawks GM Saleh gets promotion, deal
items.summary: The Hawks signed Onsi Saleh to a long-term contract extension and promoted him from general manager to president of basketball operations, it was announced on Wednesday.

items.title: Source: Lakers lay off over a dozen amid reorg
items.summary: The Lakers informed more than a dozen employees Wednesday they were being laid off as part of a reorganization under new franchise leadership, a source familiar with the situation told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Projected 1st-rounder Peat stays in draft...
items.summary: Arizona forward Koa Peat, a projected first-round pick, is keeping his name in the NBA draft, sources told ESPN on Wednesday.

items.title: Celtics' Mazzulla named NBA Coach of the Year
items.summary: Boston's Joe Mazzulla was named NBA Coach of the Year over finalists J.B. Bickerstaff and Mitch Johnson on Tuesday night, officially wrapping up the league's end-of-season awards schedule.

items.title: Sources: Atkinson to return as Cavs head coach
items.summary: Kenny Atkinson will return next season as the Cleveland Cavaliers coach, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

items.title: Hammon stands by Brunson take: Prove me wrong
items.summary: Aces coach Becky Hammon didn't completely back down from her assertion that a player of Jalen Brunson's stature could lead a team to an NBA title, saying Brunson will have to prove her wrong.

items.title: 👀 The players who could shape the offseason
items.summary: These are the most important NBA deals that could get done, plus how each outcome could help shape next season.
